# @platform/adapters-brevo

Brevo (Sendinblue) adapter: transactional email delivery implementation for the email-runtime interface.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-brevo
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-brevo
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: email-brevo
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Implement the email-runtime provider interface using the Brevo Transactional Email API
- Map platform email payloads to Brevo API request shapes
- Handle Brevo API rate limits, retries, and error responses
- Resolve API key from config-runtime — never from hardcoded values

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define the email send interface (owned by email-runtime)
- Does not own email template markup or Brevo template management
- Does not manage marketing campaign emails or contact lists

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Registered at application startup as the concrete email provider
- Never imported by feature or domain packages — only by application entrypoints

```text
application
```

```text
contract
```

### Depends on

```text
@platform/email-runtime
@platform/config-runtime
```

### Provides APIs

```text
brevo-email-adapter
```

### Consumes APIs

```text
email-service
config-service
Brevo Transactional Email API
```

## Operational notes

- Brevo free tier: 300 emails/day — monitor daily volume and upgrade before approaching limit
- API key is resolved from config-runtime; never commit to source control
- Template IDs in Brevo must match the template contract types defined in email-runtime
